Executive Summary
The CARS24 chatbot handled 4538 sessions (1989 DSQ · 2549 QNR) and is performing positively, converting 40% of interactions into new auctions. Resolution quality is developing at 43.8% among dropped sessions, and the 9.1% repeat-message bug warrants attention. 8.3% of sessions triggered both an auction and a ticket.
